case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE RENE TZIU HAU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TZIU HAU, JOSE RENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2019 - SOFIA REYES AS LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY WOHL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
